cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Thomas went to the football field today, and I need to figure out between what times he could have gone. The options are (A) 12pm to 2pm, (B) 8am to 10am, (C) 2pm to 5pm, (D) 5pm to 6pm. First, let me list out all the information given. Thomas started his day by waking up at 8am. Then David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So between 8am and 10am, Thomas was at the electronic store. Then Jennifer saw him buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. So from 10 to 12, he was at the deli. Then Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So between 12 and 2pm, he was heading to the Statue of Liberty. Then Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone
